svg.title: LoRA and frozen Spearman seed-grid ranges by dataset and budget
svg.desc: A two-panel point-range chart compares LoRA and frozen test Spearman across GB1 and AAV budgets. Each panel uses a local x-axis range fitted to the observed seed-pair values. Small points show the nine seed-pair runs, large markers show means, and horizontal lines show min-max seed-pair ranges.

g.font-family: Plus Jakarta Sans, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
